items.prompt: a reference to the various locations where high-rise wooden buildings can be found

pairs.p: Vancouver, Vienna and Brumunddal in Norway
pairs.note: 题干说各种地点，原文列举了三个具体城市，属于同义替换。
题干中的'高层木建筑'对应原文的'建造的高大木建筑'，'high-rise'替换为'tall'。
题干说'可以被找到'，原文说'都是...的所在地'，表达相同含义。

paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'various locations'和'high-rise wooden buildings'，到原文找具体地名和'tall, wooden buildings'，即可定位到D段。

items.prompt: an indication of how widely available the raw materials of concrete are

pairs.note: widely available（广泛可得）替换为found in abundance（大量存在）
raw materials（原材料）替换为ingredients（成分）

paraphrase.trap: 题干中的raw materials可能被误认为指concrete本身，但原文明确指ingredients of concrete
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词widely available和raw materials of concrete，到原文找found in abundance和ingredients of concrete即可定位

items.prompt: the belief that more high-rise wooden buildings are needed before wood can be regarded as a viable construction material

pairs.q: the belief that more high-rise wooden buildings are needed before wood can be regarded as a viable construction material
pairs.p: only when a wider range of construction projects has been proven in practice will it be possible to see wood as a real alternative to concrete in constructing tall buildings
pairs.note: 题干说需要更多高层木建筑才能视木材为可行材料，原文说只有更多项目被证明才能视木材为混凝土的替代，意思相同，但句式从'需要...才能'变为'只有...才'。

pairs.q: more high-rise wooden buildings are needed
pairs.p: a wider range of construction projects has been proven in practice
pairs.note: '更多高层木建筑'替换为'更广泛的建筑项目在实践中得到验证'，范围扩大但核心一致。

pairs.q: wood can be regarded as a viable construction material
pairs.p: see wood as a real alternative to concrete in constructing tall buildings
pairs.note: '被视为可行建筑材料'替换为'被视为混凝土在建造高层建筑中的真正替代品'，具体化但含义相同。

paraphrase.trap: 注意题干中的'before'对应原文的'only when'，但原文是条件状语从句，题干是时间状语从句，容易误以为顺序相反。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'need more high-rise wooden buildings'和'regard wood as viable'，到原文找表达'需要更多项目'和'视木材为替代'的句子，发现F段末尾句用'only when...will it be possible'表达了相同条件关系。

questions.title: Questions 5–8
instructions: Choose ONE WORD ONLY from the passage for each answer.
Write your answers in boxes 5–8 on your answer sheet.

items.prompt: Wood is a traditional building material, but current environmental concerns are encouraging 5 ____ to use wood in modern construction projects.

pairs.note: 题干中的'当前环境问题'对应原文的'气候变化'，是同义替换。

pairs.p: driving architects to turn to treated timber
pairs.note: 题干'鼓励使用木材'与原文'驱使建筑师转向处理过的木材'是句式改写，意思相同。
答案'architects'在原文中直接出现，是原词复现。

paraphrase.trap: 可能误填'builders'或'engineers'，但原文明确提到'architects'。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'current environmental concerns'和'encouraging ... to use wood'，到原文找对应表达'climate change'和'driving architects to turn to treated timber'，从而定位到主语'architects'。

items.prompt: Using wood, however, has its challenges. For example, as 6 ____ in the atmosphere enters wood, it increases in size.

pairs.note: 题干说‘进入木材’，原文说‘从空气中吸收水分’，动作方向相反但意思一致。
‘尺寸增加’就是‘膨胀’。
‘大气中’和‘从空气中’同义。

paraphrase.trap: 可能误填‘pests’或‘fire’，但题干要求的是进入木材后使其变大的物质。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干‘enters wood’和‘increases in size’，到原文找‘expands’和‘absorbs moisture from the air’，确定答案‘moisture’。

items.prompt: In one process, 7 ____ of solid wood are glued together to create building blocks.
Experts say that wooden buildings are an improvement on those made of concrete and steel in terms of the 8 ____ with which they can be constructed and how much noise is generated by the process.

pairs.q: improvement on those made of concrete and steel
pairs.p: greater speed than ones of concrete and steel
pairs.note: 题干说木质建筑比混凝土和钢建筑有改进，原文说速度更快，是具体化改进

pairs.q: in terms of the speed with which they can be constructed
pairs.p: can be constructed at a greater speed
pairs.note: 题干'speed with which they can be constructed'对应原文'can be constructed at a greater speed'，都是讲建造速度

pairs.q: how much noise is generated by the process
pairs.p: the process, it seems, is quieter
pairs.note: 题干问噪音大小，原文说更安静，同义替换

paraphrase.trap: 题干中'improvement on'可能误导学生找'better'等词，实际原文用'greater speed'体现改进
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'improvement'和'speed'，到原文找'greater speed'，发现原文直接对应，答案就是'speed'

questions.title: Questions 9–13
instructions: Look at the following statements (Questions 9–13) and the list of people below.
Match each statement with the correct person, A, B, C or D.
Write the correct letter, A, B, C or D, in boxes 9–13 on your answer sheet.
NB You may use any letter more than once.
D Felix Preston and Johanna Lehne

items.prompt: The environmental advantage of cement alternatives may not be as great as initially assumed.

pairs.note: 题干说'环境优势'，原文说'减碳角度'，意思相近。

pairs.q: may not be as great as initially assumed
pairs.note: 题干说'可能没有最初认为的那么大'，原文说'可能没有意义'，表达类似。
题干说'水泥替代品'，原文说'替代材料'，同义。

paraphrase.trap: 注意题干说'环境优势'，原文具体到'减碳'，但其他环境方面未提及，不要过度推断。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'cement alternatives'和'environmental advantage'，到原文找'alternative materials'和'carbon reduction perspective'，再找否定表达'might not make sense'对应'not as great as assumed'。

items.prompt: It would be hard to create a construction alternative to concrete that offers so many comparable benefits.

pairs.q: hard to create a construction alternative to concrete
pairs.p: Making anything with similar properties is going to be very difficult
pairs.note: 题干说'很难创造出混凝土的替代品'，原文说'制造具有类似特性的任何东西都非常困难'，意思相同。
题干'提供许多可比的好处'对应原文'类似特性'，即混凝土的优点。

paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'hard to create alternative'和'comparable benefits'，到原文找表达困难的句子，找到'very difficult'和'similar properties'即可定位。

items.prompt: Worries about the environment have led to increased interest in wood as a construction material.

pairs.note: 题干中的环境担忧对应原文的气候变化担忧，是同义替换。

pairs.q: increased interest in wood as a construction material
pairs.p: increasing demand globally for building in wood
pairs.note: 题干中的兴趣增加对应原文的需求增长，且都指向木材作为建筑材料。

paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'environment'和'wood as a construction material'，到原文找对应表达，发现'climate change concerns'和'building in wood'，从而定位到B选项。

items.prompt: Expense has been a factor in the negative response to the development of new cements.

pairs.note: 题干中的'Expense'（费用）对应原文中的'cost-effective'（成本效益），都是关于成本的概念。
题干中的'negative response'（负面反应）对应原文中的'resistance from customers'（客户的抵触），意思相同。
题干中的'new cements'（新水泥）对应原文中的'these alternatives'（这些替代品），指代同一事物。

paraphrase.trap: 注意题干中的'factor'（因素）在原文中并未直接出现，而是通过'rarely as cost-effective'和'resistance'体现因果关系。
paraphrase.explain: 先抓题干关键词'Expense'和'negative response'，到原文找表示成本（cost-effective）和客户抵触（resistance from customers）的对应表达。

items.prompt: The environmental damage caused by concrete is due to it being produced in large quantities.

pairs.note: 题干说环境损害，原文说高碳，高碳是环境损害的一种具体表现。

pairs.p: scale on which it is used
